PETITION FOR LETTERS OF ADMINISTRATION WITH WILL ANNEXED
Off Calendar Oct-14-2020 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:

No appearance was made by any Party, Counsel or Interested Person.

This matter was put on for hearing with no appearance required for the purpose of admitting the will. The Court granted the Petition for Letters of Administration With Will Annexed. The will is admitted to probate. Charles Cheever is appointed as the Administrator of the estate with full authority. Bond is set at 20,000.00. Order for the same signed. Status on close of estate is set for January 24, 2022 at 9:00 a.m., in Dpet. 204.

Judge: Ross C. Moody. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Probate Examiner: Helen Trowbridge. Deputy: K. Kabasares. Not reported.
